sections.paragraph:
f. רַכַּה adj. (from the root רָכַךְ)-

(1) tender, spoken of little children, Gen 33:13 of cattle, young and tender of flesh, Gen 18:7.

(2) infirm, 2Sa 3:39. עֵינַיִם רַכֹּות weak, dull eyes [ Gen 29:17 ], (which was considered a defect, compare 1Sa 16:12). Vulg. lippi, Gen 29:17. LXX. ἀσθενεῖς. Hence-

(3) delicate, Deu 28:54, 56 Deu 28:56.

(4) soft, Pro 15:1. רַכֹּות soft words, Job 40:27 .

(5) רַךְ לֵבָב fearful, Deu 20:8 2Ch 13:7.
